basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 42 Nursing Officer, Staff Nurse Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC), Government of Mizoram
basic_details.department: Health & Family Welfare Department / Home (Prisons) Department, Govt. of Mizoram
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026: Get the latest Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) recruitment notification 2026 for 42 contractual positions including Nursing Officer and Staff Nurse vacancies under Health & Family Welfare Department and Home (Prisons) Department, Government of Mizoram. The online application process starts on 8th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 12th June 2026 (up to 4:00 PM). Find MPSC Nursing Officer and Staff Nurse vacancies on the official website mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming MPSC Nursing Recruitment 2026" notifi

important_dates.exam_date: To be notified on official website

application_fee.details: Application fee details are as per MPSC norms. Persons with Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from payment of application fee. Other candidates must check the official portal for exact fee structure.

age_limit.age_relaxation: Up to 5 years (or as per Government rules)
age_limit.details: Age limit is calculated as on 01-01-2026. Age relaxation is available for SC/ST candidates and other reserved categories as per Government of Mizoram rules.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions including educational qualification, computer proficiency, Mizo language proficiency, and age limit as on the crucial date (01-01-2026). Government servants must apply through proper channel. | Post-Wise Educational Qualification: | Additional Mandatory Requirements: | Computer Proficiency: As prescribed by Mizoram Group 'A', 'B' & 'C' posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023. Candidates must possess Computer Proficiency Certificate. Mizo Language Proficiency: Mandatory requirement. However, exemption is granted to candidates who have studied Mizo up to Class-X or above. Nursing Council Registration: Valid registration certificate from appropriate Nursing Council is mandatory

vacancy_details.Reservation Details: 2 reserved for PwBD + 2 reserved for Ex-Servicemen

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 7 of the Pay Matrix (7th CPC)
salary_details.nursing officer (contract): Level 7 of the Pay Matrix (7th CPC)
salary_details.staff nurse (contract): Level 7 of the Pay Matrix (7th CPC)
salary_details.details: The selected candidates will be appointed on contractual basis in Group 'B' (Non-Gazetted) posts with pay scale at Level 7 of the Pay Matrix as per 7th Central Pay Commission adopted by Government of Mizoram. The contractual employees will also be entitled to allowances as per Government rules. | Note: The appointment is contractual in nature. Pay and allowances will be as per Government of Mizoram rules applicable to contractual employees.

selection_process: The selection process for MPSC Nursing Officer & Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 consists of Written Examination
and Mizo Language Proficiency Test (wherever applicable). The syllabus for the written examination is available on the official MPSC website.

Written Examination: Candidates will be required to appear for a written examination based on the prescribed syllabus available on the official MPSC website Document Verification: Candidates qualifying in the written examination will be called for document verification Mizo Language Proficiency Test: Wherever applicable (exemption for candidates who studied Mizo up to Class-X or above)
Detailed syllabus for Written Examination is available on the official MPSC website Syllabus Link: Click Here
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Mizoram Public Service Commission online portal (https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in/). No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 08-05-2026 to 12-06-2026 (up to 4:00 PM). New users must complete one-time registration before 12-06-2026 (4:00 PM).
Steps to Apply Online:
Step 1: Visit MPSC Online Portal - Go to https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in/
Step 2: One-Time Registration (for New Users) - If you are a new user, complete one-time registration on the portal before 12-06-2026 (4:00 PM). Existing users can directly login.
Step 3: Login to Portal - Login using your registered credentials

Step 4: Fill Application Form - Fill the online application form carefully with all required details: Personal details Educational qualifications Nursing Council registration details Computer proficiency details Mizo language proficiency details Category details (if claiming PwBD/Ex-Servicemen reservation)
Personal details
Educational qualifications
Nursing Council registration details
Computer proficiency details
Mizo language proficiency details
Category details (if claiming PwBD/Ex-Servicemen reservation)
Step 5: Upload Documents - Upload scanned copies of all required documents as per specifications
Step 6: Pay Application Fee - Pay application fee online (if applicable) through available payment modes. PwBD candidates are exempted from fee payment.
Step 7: Submit Application - Review all details carefully and submit the application
Step 8: Verify Submission - Verify that your application status shows "Submitted" after payment. Take printout of submitted application for future reference.
Documents to be Uploaded with Online Application:
HSLC (Class 10th) Marksheet & Certificate
Higher Secondary (Class 12th) Marksheet & Certificate
Nursing qualification certificates (RNRM certificate for Nursing Officer / GNM certificate for Staff Nurse)
Nursing Council Registration Certificate (valid registration)
Computer Proficiency Certificate (as per Mizoram Group 'A', 'B' & 'C' posts Rules, 2023)
Mizo Language Proficiency Certificate (if applicable - exemption for those who studied Mizo up to Class-X or above)
Age Proof Certificate (10th certificate/Birth certificate)
PwBD Certificate issued by competent authority (if claiming PwBD reservation)
Ex-Servicemen Certificate (if claiming Ex-Servicemen reservation)
SC/ST certificate (if applicable)
Any other relevant documents as mentioned in the notification
Apply Online at: https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in/
important_instructions: Application must be submitted online only through MPSC online portal Last date for online application: 12-06-2026 (up to 4:00 PM) Last date for one-time registration (new users): 12-06-2026 (4:00 PM) Age calculated as on 01-01-2026: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 35 years Age relaxation: Up to 5 years for SC/ST or as per Government rules Educational Qualification: RNRM for Nursing Officer / GNM for Staff Nurse with valid Nursing Council registration Computer Proficiency Certificate mandatory as per Mizoram Group 'A', 'B' & 'C' posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023 Mizo Language Proficiency mandatory (exemption for candidates who studied Mizo up to Class-X or above) Application fee: PwBD candidates exempted; others as per MPSC norms Candidates must ensure their application is successfully submitted after payment Verify that application status shows "Submitted" after fee payment Government servants should apply through proper channel Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate Selection through: Written Examination + Document Verification + Mizo Language Proficiency Test (wherever applicable) Syllabus for written examination available on official MPSC website All updates will be published on the MPSC official website only Candidates are advised to visit the official website regularly for updates regarding admit card, examination schedule, and results

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in MPSC Nursing Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Mizoram PSC has announced 42 contractual vacancies including 40 Nursing Officer and 2 Staff Nurse positions under Health & Family Welfare and Home (Prisons) Departments.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for MPSC Nursing Officer 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications is 12 June 2026 (up to 4:00 PM) through the MPSC online portal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for MPSC Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have RNRM registration for Nursing Officer or GNM certificate for Staff Nurse, computer proficiency certificate, and Mizo language proficiency (exemption if studied Mizo up to Class-X).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for MPSC Nursing Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is 21 to 35 years as on 01 January 2026, with relaxation for SC/ST and other categories as per Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for MPSC Nursing Officer 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Level 7 Pay Matrix (7th CPC) salary as per Government of Mizoram contractual employee rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for MPSC Nursing Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection includes Written Examination, Document Verification, and Mizo Language Proficiency Test (where applicable).

faq.question: Q7. Is there application fee for MPSC Nursing Officer 2026?
faq.answer: PwBD candidates are exempted from application fee. Other candidates must pay as per MPSC norms (check official portal).

faq.question: Q8. What is the qualification required for MPSC Staff Nurse 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have GNM (General Nursing & Midwifery) certificate and be registered with Nursing Council.
